gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 initially blocked duplicate raw measurement rejection as incompatible with valid per-example/per-repeat benchmark outputs; removed that uniqueness check, added a repeated-raw-measurement acceptance test, and GPT-5.5 re-reviewed cleanly as safe to merge.
what_changed: Validated V1 benchmark dataset and arm identities before counting required release coverage.
Rejected duplicate V1 summary report rows and duplicate per-dataset comparison rows.
Kept repeated raw measurements valid because benchmark measurements are per-example/per-repeat observations.
why: Release readiness should fail closed for malformed or duplicated summary identities without rejecting valid raw benchmark outputs.
